title: Rename support chats headers
excerpt: Would be great to be able to rename support chats/make notes/comments yourself so it’s searchable in the future by key words so it’s easy to find and not just “Conversation with …” for everything

posts.author: nsosnina (Natalia)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to be able to rename support chats/make notes/comments yourself so it’s searchable in the future by key words so it’s easy to find and not just “Conversation with …” for everything

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
